label: Position Summary
description: Six KPIs: position count, total notional, unrealised P&L, margin used, long exposure, and short exposure.

checks.0.1_error_boundary: pass — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89
checks.0.4_no_any_ts_ignore: pass — no any or @ts-ignore in widget file
checks.0.5_no_mock_imports: pass — widget imports only from context, shared, and lib/reference-data
checks.0.6_loading_state: fixed — added isLoading to usePositionsData() destructure; all metric values render "—" when loading
checks.0.7_empty_state: pass — KPI strip shows zeros when positions array is empty (valid state for a summary strip)
checks.0.8_error_state: fixed — added positionsError guard: renders rose error message when context reports an error
checks.0.9_dead_code: pass — no commented-out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: Fixed 0.6 and 0.8: widget was destructuring only summary from context, ignoring isLoading and positionsError. Both now wired. useMemo kept before the conditional return to satisfy Rules of Hooks.

checks.1.1_data_from_context: pass — reads summary, isLoading, positionsError exclusively via usePositionsData()
checks.1.2_context_uses_global_scope: pass — positions-data-context.tsx uses useGlobalScope() and scopeStrategyIds
checks.1.3_org_filter: pass — positions filtered by scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope.organizationIds (context line 584-587)
checks.1.4_client_filter: pass — getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; org→client→strategy cascade in context
checks.1.5_strategy_filter: pass — local strategyFilter + globalScope.strategyIds both applied
checks.1.6_no_filter_shows_all: pass — scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 skips scope filter (context line 584)
checks.1.7_reference_data_location: pass — widget has no inline reference data; formatCurrency imported from lib/reference-data (correct location)

l1.notes: Context (read-only): DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS is inline in the context (positions-data-context.tsx lines 113-219). This is a context-layer concern, not a widget concern. Flagged for future context cleanup.

knownIssues.description: DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS (5 hardcoded positions) is defined inline in positions-data-context.tsx. Should be moved to lib/mocks/fixtures/ once context is refactored.

findings.description: Widget was not reading isLoading from usePositionsData(). All 6 metric values now show "—" while loading.
Widget was not reading positionsError from usePositionsData(). Added error guard returning a rose error message before KpiSummaryWidget render.
